name: display sentinel: 'archivist' is word-bounded — does not match inside larger words

source.purpose: Precision check. The single-token forbidden term 'archivist' uses word boundaries; prose containing 'archive' or 'archivists' (plural inflection inside a longer surface) should NOT fire. This fixture pins the precision contract before any future genre adds richer Archivist-as-NPC vocabulary.

narrator.prose: The archive is older than the registry building. Dust along the shelves. The keeper's title was 'archivist of records' — but you remember, archives have weight here.
